description: Phase 16 continued - Contextual Sidekick: Implement the 5th differentiator as a new package. This is an AI panel that changes tools based on the current app context and selected resource.
steps: Create packages/contextual-sidekick/ package with: package.json (@quant/contextual-sidekick, deps: @quant/common, @quant/ai, zod), tsconfig.json (extends root, refs common and ai), src/types.ts (SidekickPanel, SidekickTool, SidekickContext, AppContextMapping types), src/sidekick-engine.ts (SidekickEngine class - determines which tools/actions are relevant for the current app context and selected resource), src/context-detector.ts (ContextDetector class - detects what the user is working on and suggests relevant actions), src/tool-adapter.ts (ToolAdapter class - adapts the same tool for different app contexts), src/index.ts (barrel exports), src/__tests__/sidekick.test.ts (test context detection, tool selection, panel generation for different app contexts)
Run pnpm install to register new package, then run pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, and pnpm lint
acceptance_criteria: packages/contextual-sidekick/ exists with complete implementation and passing tests
SidekickEngine correctly selects different tool sets for different app contexts (quantchat vs quantmail vs quantdocs)
ContextDetector identifies resource type from context and suggests relevant actions
All quality gates pass: typecheck, build, test, lint
